name: hockey-smash
description: Static Hockey Smash browser game verification helpers.

scripts.verify: npm run verify:syntax && npm run verify:hockey && npm run verify:actions
scripts.verify:syntax: node --check script.js && node --check js/games/hockey-smash.js && node --check js/games/hockey-smash-polish.js && node --check scripts/verify-hockey-smash.js && node --check scripts/verify-hockey-smash-actions.js
